title: thalictrum lecoyeri var. lecoyeri
intro: Thalictrum lecoyeri var. lecoyeri, also known as Lecoq's Meadow Rue, is a perennial plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is characterized by its delicate white to pale pink flowers and fern-like foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Thalictrum lecoyeri var. lecoyeri, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, and may also have antioxidant and anti-arthritic effects.
